captured_at: wave-2 step 1: per-axle slip-angle decomposition + brake-sign smoothing
notes: Rebaselined after Wave-2 Step 1 (per-axle bicycle kinematics) + Step 5 (forward_speed.signum() → tanh smooth-sign at v_eps = 0.5 m/s). Front/rear now see different α once the car yaws or slides, which restores front-vs-rear grip asymmetry. Dry 80m lat-g rose 8.123 → 8.164 (+0.5%); oil 80m lat-g fell 7.871 → 7.741 (-1.7%) — the oil scenario has lower grip so the per-axle effect dominates over the dry case.
